intro: A colorful stall stands in the square, a hand-painted sign reading 'WHO'S THAT POKEMON?'
speaker: Booth Operator
introDialogue: Step right up! Name the mystery Pokémon from its shadow alone!$Each one you call right bumps up your prize - but miss even once and you walk away with nothing. Care to test your eye?
title: The Guessing Booth
description: A festival silhouette game. Pay a small fee, then name each shadowed Pokémon from four choices. Every correct call raises your prize (up to an Ultra Ball), but one wrong answer ends the game empty-handed. Press your luck!

1.label: Play (pay the fee)
1.tooltip:
(-) A small fee
(+) Name silhouettes for a rising prize, capped at an Ultra Ball
1.selected: You hand over the fee. The operator grins and pulls the first card...
